languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

languages.text: "Я вижу вам непривычно чего-то не знать, господин ван Калокс. Однако в неведении нет ничего предосудительного — ведь познание всегда начинается с вопроса, направленного в неизведанное. На ваш вопрос я не отвечу чего-либо, что вы не знаете сами, так что возможно вам стоит искать ответы где-то еще".

"Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

Однако в неведении нет ничего предосудительного — ведь познание всегда начинается с вопроса, направленного в неизведанное. На ваш вопрос я не отвечу чего-либо, что вы не знаете сами, так что возможно вам стоит искать ответы где-то еще".

But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

"Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

"Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

languages.text: «Veo que desconocer algo es una experiencia extraña para usted, maestro van Calox. No se preocupe: no hay nada de malo en la ignorancia, pues el saber siempre empieza con una pregunta a lo desconocido. No le proporcionaré información que no tenga ya, de modo que debería buscar respuestas en otro lugar».
languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

traits.locale_text: «Veo que desconocer algo es una experiencia extraña para usted, maestro van Calox. No se preocupe: no hay nada de malo en la ignorancia, pues el saber siempre empieza con una pregunta a lo desconocido. No le proporcionaré información que no tenga ya, de modo que debería buscar respuestas en otro lugar».

languages.text: 「何かを知らずにいることが、あなたには不慣れな経験なのですね、ヴァン・カロックス殿。しかし、無知に恥ずべきところは何もありません――知識とは常に、未知へと投げかけられた一つの問いから始まるものですから。私は、あなたがすでに持っていない情報を提供するつもりはありません。ですから、答えは別のところでお探しになるとよいでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

traits.locale_text: 「何かを知らずにいることが、あなたには不慣れな経験なのですね、ヴァン・カロックス殿。しかし、無知に恥ずべきところは何もありません――知識とは常に、未知へと投げかけられた一つの問いから始まるものですから。私は、あなたがすでに持っていない情報を提供するつもりはありません。ですから、答えは別のところでお探しになるとよいでしょう」

languages.text: “看来，对某些事无知于你而言是种陌生的体验，冯·卡洛克斯大人。但无知并不可耻，因为知识总始于向未知抛出问题。我不会提供任何你尚未掌握的信息，所以也许你该去别处寻找答案。”
languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

traits.locale_text: “看来，对某些事无知于你而言是种陌生的体验，冯·卡洛克斯大人。但无知并不可耻，因为知识总始于向未知抛出问题。我不会提供任何你尚未掌握的信息，所以也许你该去别处寻找答案。”

languages.text: "Etwas nicht zu wissen, ist ein ungewohntes Erlebnis für Euch, das verstehe ich, Meister van Calox. Allerdings ist Unwissenheit nicht verwerflich ... denn Wissen beginnt stets mit einer ins Unbekannte gestellten Frage. Ich werde keine Informationen liefern, die Ihr nicht bereits habt. Ihr solltet also möglicherweise andernorts nach Antworten suchen."
languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

traits.locale_text: "Etwas nicht zu wissen, ist ein ungewohntes Erlebnis für Euch, das verstehe ich, Meister van Calox. Allerdings ist Unwissenheit nicht verwerflich ... denn Wissen beginnt stets mit einer ins Unbekannte gestellten Frage. Ich werde keine Informationen liefern, die Ihr nicht bereits habt. Ihr solltet also möglicherweise andernorts nach Antworten suchen."

languages.text: « À ce que je vois, vous trouver en position d'ignorance n'est pas une expérience qui vous est familière, maître van Calox. Il n'y a pourtant rien de répréhensible à l'ignorance : le savoir commence toujours par une question jetée dans l'inconnu. Je ne vous fournirai aucune information supplémentaire. Je vous suggère donc de chercher des réponses ailleurs. »
languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."

Il n'y a pourtant rien de répréhensible à l'ignorance : le savoir commence toujours par une question jetée dans l'inconnu. Je ne vous fournirai aucune information supplémentaire. Je vous suggère donc de chercher des réponses ailleurs. »

languages.text: "Görüyorum ki bir şeyi bilmemek sizin için alışılmadık bir deneyim Üstat van Calox. Ancak cehalette kınanacak hiçbir şey yoktur. Zira bilgi, her zaman bilinmeyene yöneltilen bir soruyla başlar. Zaten sahip olmadığın bilgileri sana vermeyeceğim, cevapları başka yerde aramalısın."
languages.original_text: "Not knowing something is an unfamiliar experience for you, I see, Master van Calox. But there is nothing reprehensible about ignorance — for knowledge always begins with a question cast out into the unknown. I will not supply any information that you do not already possess, so perhaps you should look elsewhere for answers."
